name: Quickie Salmon-Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and remove any dark skin or bones.
2. Break the salmon into one-inch pieces.
3. Heat the potato soup with milk, celery, salt, and pepper in a saucepan over medium heat until warmed through.
4. Add the broken salmon to the heated mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle shredded wheat evenly over the top of the casserole.
7. Dot the top with butter.
8. Place under the broiler for a few minutes, just until the top is lightly browned.
